posts.text:
started using @NousResearch Hermes + GPT 5.6 Sol a few weeks ago for wedding planning. wish i’d done it this way sooner

saved my life from the hell that is the seating chart and having to account for all the who-likes-who etc.

Madonna - meh 
BTS - sick 
Bieber - I’m a huge fan, but felt like the wrong song selection for the moment
Shakira - always awesome 
Muppets- what the actual F

Agree with all of this. 

Re: compounding, one principle I abide by is 1% improvement every day, while may not feel like much, over the course of the year leads to massive gains. So take that step forward, even on days where you may not feel like it.

1.01^365 = 37.78 https://t.co/7AWHMsBiYL

A lot of people talk about hiring great talent

Far fewer talk about building the environment where that talent actually does its best work

- Creative freedom
- Ownership
- Systems that evolve with feedback
- Room to experiment
- Safety to make mistakes
- A chance to learn from

Spent way too long getting the Glyph leaderboard right (Still updating). A quick tour of everything that was wrong.

v1 was plain win rate (W / W+L). Sounds fair until someone plays 1 game, wins it, and outranks the person who went 30-10 across 40 games. Nope.

v2 was weighted https://t.co/3fSNzS6aji
btw Mickey Mouse and Minnie Mouse’s full names are Michael and Minerva Mouse
